articles.author: Justina Lee
articles.title: Japan's Nikkei hits record high as Asia markets rise amid Middle East concerns - CNBC
articles.description: Asia-Pacific markets opened higher even amid concerns over volatile oil prices with the Strait of Hormuz remaining closed.
articles.content:
A stock broker at the Prudential Brokerage office follows the Hang Seng Index results in Hong Kong in March 2020.
